name: HRT_PERSON_ASSIGNMENTS_D
query: SELECT person.PERSON_ID, assign.ASSIGNMENT_ID, assign.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, assign.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, assign.JOB_ID, assign.POSITION_ID, person.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, assign.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID, assign.ORGANIZATION_ID, assign.LOCATION_ID, person.START_DATE, assign.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE, assign.GRADE_ID, superv.MANAGER_ID, superv.MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID FROM PER_PERSONS_V person, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M_V assign, PER_ASSIGNMENT_SUPERVISORS_F_V superv WHERE assign.PERSON_ID = person.PERSON_ID AND assign.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE in ('E','C') AND assign.PRIMARY_FLAG = 'Y' AND assign.ASSIGNMENT_ID = superv.ASSIGNMENT_ID(+) AND superv.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+) BETWEEN assign.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND assign.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AND superv.PRIMARY_FLAG(+) = 'Y'
